feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Drifting
entry.content: In my poverty, I had no recourse but to seek alternate means of acquiring worth. I walked to the pawnbroker’s house to pawn my father’s watch with her. I don’t know why, but suddenly I felt anger rise up in me… perhaps it was because she tried to cheat me out of my money. But why is this idea torturing me? Why do I feel this? She does not deseve to live… I still feel shame. I don’t want to be thinking these thoughts… It feels like I’m in an abyss… just drifting around… but I’m rambling again.
entry.summary: In my poverty, I had no recourse but to seek alternate means of acquiring worth. I walked to the pawnbroker’s house to pawn my father’s watch with her. I don’t know why, but suddenly I felt anger rise up in me… perhaps it was because she tried to cheat me out of my money. But why is this idea torturing me? Why do I feel this? She does not deseve to live… I still feel shame. I don’t want to be thinking these thoughts… It feels like I’m in an abyss… just drifting around… but I’m rambling again.

entry.title: Confusion and Control
entry.content: I can feel my desires coming up…. That dream was confusing… poor horse. But I can’t be pitying the victim; after all, I may soon become the oppressor myself! It broils up inside of me… I can feel it slowly growing in power. But what a strange coincidence… that I saw Lizaveta… and learned an exact time when Alyona would be alone… to do that.
entry.summary: I can feel my desires coming up…. That dream was confusing… poor horse. But I can’t be pitying the victim; after all, I may soon become the oppressor myself! It broils up inside of me… I can feel it slowly growing in power. But what a strange coincidence… that I saw Lizaveta… and learned an exact time when Alyona would be alone… to do that.

entry.title: a post with vega lite
entry.content:
This is an example post with some vega lite code.

```vega_lite
{
  "$schema": "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
  "description": "A dot plot showing each movie in the database, and the difference from the average movie rating. The display is sorted by year to visualize everything in sequential order. The graph is for all Movies before 2019.",
  "data": {
    "url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vega/vega/main/docs/data/movies.json"
  },
  "transform": [
    {"filter": "datum['IMDB Rating'] != null"},
    {"filter": {"timeUnit": "year", "field": "Release Date", "range": [null, 2019]}},
    {
      "joinaggregate": [{
        "op": "mean",
        "field": "IMDB Rating",
        "as": "AverageRating"
      }]
    },
    {
      "calculate": "datum['IMDB Rating'] - datum.AverageRating",
      "as": "RatingDelta"
    }
  ],
  "mark": "point",
  "encoding": {
    "x": {
      "field": "Release Date",
      "type": "temporal"
    },
    "y": {
      "field": "RatingDelta",
      "type": "quantitative",
      "title": "Rating Delta"
    },
    "color": {
      "field": "RatingDelta",
      "type": "quantitative",
      "scale": {"domainMid": 0},
      "title": "Rating Delta"
    }
  }
}
```

Which generates:

{
  "$schema": "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json",
  "description": "A dot plot showing each movie in the database, and the difference from the average movie rating. The display is sorted by year to visualize everything in sequential order. The graph is for all Movies before 2019.",
  "data": {
    "url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vega/vega/main/docs/data/movies.json"
  },
  "transform": [
    {"filter": "datum['IMDB Rating'] != null"},
    {"filter": {"timeUnit": "year", "field": "Release Date", "range": [null, 2019]}},
    {
      "joinaggregate": [{
        "op": "mean",
        "field": "IMDB Rating",
        "as": "AverageRating"
      }]
    },
    {
      "calculate": "datum['IMDB Rating'] - datum.AverageRating",
      "as": "RatingDelta"
    }
  ],
  "mark": "point",
  "encoding": {
    "x": {
      "field": "Release Date",
      "type": "temporal"
    },
    "y": {
      "field": "RatingDelta",
      "type": "quantitative",
      "title": "Rating Delta"
    },
    "color": {
      "field": "RatingDelta",
      "type": "quantitative",
      "scale": {"domainMid": 0},
      "title": "Rating Delta"
    }
  }
}

This plot supports both light and dark themes.
entry.summary: this is what included vega lite code could look like
